attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).

# BootROM 没驱动代码也能从 eMMC 读 Preloader — 完整机制

## 1. 一句话答案

BootROM **不是"写一个 eMMC 驱动"去读 preloader**,而是利用 **eMMC JEDEC 规范 7.2 节规定的硬件级 "Alternative Boot Mode"**(也称 "boot mode" / "raw boot")。这种模式下,SoC 控制器只需要发 **两条 CMD0** 把 eMMC 重置到一个特殊状态,然后 eMMC 自己会**主动**把 BOOT0 分区内容流式推上 DAT0 数据线。BootROM 只需做最薄的一层"控制器寄存器配置 + 收数据 + 校验",完全绕开传统 MMC 协议初始化(发 CMD1 / 设 RCA / 切 transfer state / 配 HS / 配 bus width 那一长串)。

NCC Group 关于 MT8163V BootROM glitch 的论文原文是这件事最权威的公开证据:

> "In order to load the preloader from flash into RAM, the **eMMC boot mode feature** is used. Instead of sending individual READ commands, the BootROM resets the eMMC into this 'alternative boot mode'. This is accomplished by sending two `GO_IDLE_STATE` (`CMD0`) commands: first with argument of `0xF0F0F0F0` which puts the card into the 'pre-idle' state, then with `0xFFFFFFFA` which puts it into the boot state. After receiving the second command, the eMMC starts transmitting the contents of the `BOOT0` partition over the `DAT0` line in 1-bit mode."

[知识来源: NCC Group "Glitching MediaTek BootROM Security" - MT8163V 实证]
[知识来源: JEDEC eMMC 5.1 规范 7.2 节 "Boot operation mode"]
[知识来源: Linux-sunxi "Bootable eMMC" - A64 BSP u-boot 同样走 boot partition 路径]
[置信度: 高 — 这是公开协议 + 多方硬件实测]

---

## 2. 为什么"不需要驱动" — 这是一个**协议层硬件特性**,不是黑科技

eMMC 在物理层就有"开机模式"开关。JEDEC 在规范里预留这个特性,本意就是给 SoC BootROM 用的:

```
     上电瞬间                                  SoC 控制器
    eMMC 上电  ──────►  默认进入 "pre-idle" state
        │
        │   SoC 通过 CMD 线给它发 CMD0(arg=0xF0F0F0F0)
        │   (宣告: 我要让你进 alternative boot mode)
        │
        ▼
   进入 "pre-boot" 状态(等待 boot enable 确认)
        │
        │   SoC 再发 CMD0(arg=0xFFFFFFFA)
        │   (最终命令: 真的开始推 boot0 内容)
        │
        ▼
   eMMC 主动在 DAT0 上流式输出 BOOT0 内容
   ──────►  直到收到第二个 CMD0(reset)或 timeout
```

[图1 ASCII 因为用户没明确要求渲染,直接给源文本]

关键点:**数据是 eMMC 主动往外推,SoC 控制器只负责"收"**。
- 没有 CMD1 / 没有 RCA 协商 / 没有 transfer state 切换 / 没有 4-bit bus width 切换
- 时钟(host 驱 CLK)是 SoC 控制器提供的,但**协议什么样子是 eMMC 硬件决定的**
- eMMC 标准里 BOOT0/Boot1 是两个独立的"只放 bootloader"硬件分区,专门用 raw 模式给 ROM 用

Linux-sunxi 的 Allwinner A64 文档实测同样机制:`Examining mmc_burn_boot function in the A64's BSP u-boot code and experimentation confirm that booting from an eMMC boot partition is indeed supported and that BootROM expects the boot0 code located at the first sector of such partition.`

所以这个机制**不是 MTK 独有的**,是高通、苹果、TI、AMD/Xilinx Versal、NXP i.MX、Allwinner 等几乎所有 SoC BootROM 都在用的同一套 eMMC 标准规范。MTK 的特殊之处只是用得最"黑盒" — 闭源 ROM、不可改。

---

## 3. BootROM 这一侧到底做了哪些事(总步骤)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  上电 → Mask ROM 开始执行                                │
│                                                          │
│  ① 最小时钟/TLB/cache 初始化(ARM 内核自带,不碰外设)         │
│     · 关 cache · 关 MMU · 关 D-cache                       │
│                                                          │
│  ② SoC 内部时钟使能                                       │
│     · 使能 eMMC 控制器所属的 bus clock                     │
│     · 配置 PLL/分频到 eMMC 控制器能接受的频率               │
│                                                          │
│  ③ GPIO/IO MUX 切到 SD/MMC 引脚                          │
│     · power-on reset 默认 pin 多为 GPIO,需要切到 SD 模式    │
│     · 包括 CMD/CLK/DAT0/DAT1-DAT3/CLK                   │
│                                                          │
│  ④ eMMC 控制器寄存器配置(SDHCI 类寄存器)                   │
│     · 设 block size                                          │
│     · 设 BOOT_EN=1 + BOOT_MODE=alternative (关键)            │
│     · 设 timeout / 设 1-bit bus width (boot 期间固定 1-bit)  │
│     · 使能 controller / 时钟                               │
│                                                          │
│  ⑤ 发两条 CMD0                                           │
│     · CMD0(arg=0xF0F0F0F0)  → pre-idle                    │
│     · 等几毫秒(让 eMMC 自己时钟稳定)                        │
│     · CMD0(arg=0xFFFFFFFA)  → 进入 boot state              │
│                                                          │
│  ⑥ DMA / 中断方式接收 DAT0 上的数据                        │
│     · 收进内部 SRAM(ISRAM),典型 64KB-256KB                │
│     · 直到 eMMC 自己停 → 控制器报 done interrupt            │
│                                                          │
│  ⑦ 解析 preloader 镜像头                                    │
│     · 查 magic / size / 签名头                            │
│     · 引导到首次尝试位置                                  │
│     · 如果验签失败 → 读 BOOT0 第二份(BOOT0 多为双备份)     │
│                                                          │
│  ⑧ 验签(RSA-PSS / SHA-256 用 eFuse 公钥)                  │
│     · 通过 → 跳到 preloader entry                        │
│     · 不通过 → halt / 进入 Download Mode                  │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 4. 几个容易踩坑的细节

### 4.1 Preloader 只放在 **BOOT0 分区**(即"boot area 0",eMMC 4 个硬件分区之一)

eMMC 物理上分 4 块:
| 分区 | 用途 |
|------|------|
| User Data Area | 普通用户数据,所有分区表 / 文件系统在这 |
| **BOOT0** (Boot Partition 1) | **专用放 bootloader,raw 访问** |
| BOOT1 (Boot Partition 2) | 第二份 / shadow copy,通常放 WPA/Wi-Fi 校准等 |
| RPMB | 重放保护,密钥存储,BootROM 一般不读这里 |

NCC Group 原文:
> "MediaTek's preloader is the second stage in the boot process and is the first mutable code. The preloader is stored on the `BOOT0` eMMC partition. As described in section 7.2 of the eMMC specification the boot partitions are special hardware partitions, separate from the main user data partition."
> "The MediaTek SoC stores **two copies** of the preloader in `BOOT0`. If the first image is corrupt (i.e. doesn't pass the signature verification check), then the BootROM will load the second image. If both copies are corrupt, then the BootROM will enter Download Mode."

**这就是为什么"砖了 preloader 还能救"**:
- 第 1 份坏了 → BootROM 读第 2 份
- 两份都坏 → 进 Download Mode(BROM 模式),通过 USB 让 PC 重刷

DavidBuchanan314 兔 R1 MT6765 的笔记也交叉印证:"Preloader is stored in the boot0 partition of eMMC (not to be confused with the boot GPT partition)"。

### 4.2 BootROM 内部对 eMMC 控制器做了什么寄存器操作

MTK ROM 代码不开源,但 NCC Group 通过 side-channel timing + DAT0 抓波形推断出 BootROM 大约经历 100ms 左右的 eMMC 读阶段,然后 ~700ms 做解析 + 验签,之后剩下 1.2s 左右是 preloader 自己的初始化。

控制器寄存器层面(MTK SoC 通常用自研 IP 而非标准 SDHCI,但行为一致):
```
eMMC_CTRL_REG    = base + 0x00  // 控制: reset / clock enable / power
eMMC_CLK_CTRL    = base + 0x04  // 时钟分频
eMMC_INT_MASK    = base + 0x08  // 中断屏蔽
eMMC_BOOT_CTRL   = base + 0x10  // BOOT_EN=1 + BOOT_MODE=alt
eMMC_BLOCK_SIZE  = base + 0x14
eMMC_DMA_ADDR    = base + 0x20  // DMA 目标(SRAM)
eMMC_ARG_REG     = base + 0x28  // CMD0 的 argument
eMMC_CMD_REG     = base + 0x2C  // 触发 CMD0/CMD1
eMMC_RESP_REG    = base + 0x30
```

⚠️ 上面**不是实测地址**,是 SDHCI 标准寄存器布局的"典型描述",用于说明控制器操作逻辑。具体 MTK IP 的偏移量不开源,**不要照搬**。

### 4.3 真要搞明白"裸读控制器",那是个**写裸板代码**的标准嵌入式技能

DavidBuchanan314 那个针对 MT6765 的兔子笔记在 Discord 分享里说,他在 kamakiri 拿到 BROM 代码执行后,自己写了个"自定义 mmc driver"才能 dump preloader,原文:

|------|---------------------|----------------------|

```
BootROM 读 BOOT0 第 1 份 → 验签 OK → 跳转 preloader
                    ↘ 失败
                       读 BOOT0 第 2 份 → 验签 OK → 跳转 preloader
                                       ↘ 失败
                                          进入 Download Mode

                                          (USB 模拟成 MTK USB Port)
                                          → 等 SP Flash Tool 连进来
```

NCC Group 把那句 UART 字串当作 DL 模式的 fingerprint,通过 glitch 强制进入下载模式从而绕过签名验证。这就是历史上 mediaTek Kamakiri / Brass / Curie 系列 bootloader unlock 漏洞的物理基础。

# BootROM 没驱动代码也能从 eMMC 读 Preloader — 完整机制

## 1. 一句话答案

BootROM **不是"写一个 eMMC 驱动"去读 preloader**,而是利用 **eMMC JEDEC 规范 7.2 节规定的硬件级 "Alternative Boot Mode"**(也称 "boot mode" / "raw boot")。这种模式下,SoC 控制器只需要发 **两条 CMD0** 把 eMMC 重置到一个特殊状态,然后 eMMC 自己会**主动**把 BOOT0 分区内容流式推上 DAT0 数据线。BootROM 只需做最薄的一层"控制器寄存器配置 + 收数据 + 校验",完全绕开传统 MMC 协议初始化(发 CMD1 / 设 RCA / 切 transfer state / 配 HS / 配 bus width 那一长串)。

NCC Group 关于 MT8163V BootROM glitch 的论文原文是这件事最权威的公开证据:

> "In order to load the preloader from flash into RAM, the **eMMC boot mode feature** is used. Instead of sending individual READ commands, the BootROM resets the eMMC into this 'alternative boot mode'. This is accomplished by sending two `GO_IDLE_STATE` (`CMD0`) commands: first with argument of `0xF0F0F0F0` which puts the card into the 'pre-idle' state, then with `0xFFFFFFFA` which puts it into the boot state. After receiving the second command, the eMMC starts transmitting the contents of the `BOOT0` partition over the `DAT0` line in 1-bit mode."

[知识来源: NCC Group "Glitching MediaTek BootROM Security" - MT8163V 实证]
[知识来源: JEDEC eMMC 5.1 规范 7.2 节 "Boot operation mode"]
[知识来源: Linux-sunxi "Bootable eMMC" - A64 BSP u-boot 同样走 boot partition 路径]
[置信度: 高 — 这是公开协议 + 多方硬件实测]

---

## 2. 为什么"不需要驱动" — 这是一个**协议层硬件特性**,不是黑科技

eMMC 在物理层就有"开机模式"开关。JEDEC 在规范里预留这个特性,本意就是给 SoC BootROM 用的:

```
     上电瞬间                                  SoC 控制器
    eMMC 上电  ──────►  默认进入 "pre-idle" state
        │
        │   SoC 通过 CMD 线给它发 CMD0(arg=0xF0F0F0F0)
        │   (宣告: 我要让你进 alternative boot mode)
        │
        ▼
   进入 "pre-boot" 状态(等待 boot enable 确认)
        │
        │   SoC 再发 CMD0(arg=0xFFFFFFFA)
        │   (最终命令: 真的开始推 boot0 内容)
        │
        ▼
   eMMC 主动在 DAT0 上流式输出 BOOT0 内容
   ──────►  直到收到第二个 CMD0(reset)或 timeout
```

[图1 ASCII 因为用户没明确要求渲染,直接给源文本]

关键点:**数据是 eMMC 主动往外推,SoC 控制器只负责"收"**。
- 没有 CMD1 / 没有 RCA 协商 / 没有 transfer state 切换 / 没有 4-bit bus width 切换
- 时钟(host 驱 CLK)是 SoC 控制器提供的,但**协议什么样子是 eMMC 硬件决定的**
- eMMC 标准里 BOOT0/Boot1 是两个独立的"只放 bootloader"硬件分区,专门用 raw 模式给 ROM 用

Linux-sunxi 的 Allwinner A64 文档实测同样机制:`Examining mmc_burn_boot function in the A64's BSP u-boot code and experimentation confirm that booting from an eMMC boot partition is indeed supported and that BootROM expects the boot0 code located at the first sector of such partition.`

所以这个机制**不是 MTK 独有的**,是高通、苹果、TI、AMD/Xilinx Versal、NXP i.MX、Allwinner 等几乎所有 SoC BootROM 都在用的同一套 eMMC 标准规范。MTK 的特殊之处只是用得最"黑盒" — 闭源 ROM、不可改。

## 4. 几个容易踩坑的细节

### 4.1 Preloader 只放在 **BOOT0 分区**(即"boot area 0",eMMC 4 个硬件分区之一)

eMMC 物理上分 4 块:
| 分区 | 用途 |
|------|------|
| User Data Area | 普通用户数据,所有分区表 / 文件系统在这 |
| **BOOT0** (Boot Partition 1) | **专用放 bootloader,raw 访问** |
| BOOT1 (Boot Partition 2) | 第二份 / shadow copy,通常放 WPA/Wi-Fi 校准等 |
| RPMB | 重放保护,密钥存储,BootROM 一般不读这里 |

NCC Group 原文:
> "MediaTek's preloader is the second stage in the boot process and is the first mutable code. The preloader is stored on the `BOOT0` eMMC partition. As described in section 7.2 of the eMMC specification the boot partitions are special hardware partitions, separate from the main user data partition."
> "The MediaTek SoC stores **two copies** of the preloader in `BOOT0`. If the first image is corrupt (i.e. doesn't pass the signature verification check), then the BootROM will load the second image. If both copies are corrupt, then the BootROM will enter Download Mode."

**这就是为什么"砖了 preloader 还能救"**:
- 第 1 份坏了 → BootROM 读第 2 份
- 两份都坏 → 进 Download Mode(BROM 模式),通过 USB 让 PC 重刷

DavidBuchanan314 兔 R1 MT6765 的笔记也交叉印证:"Preloader is stored in the boot0 partition of eMMC (not to be confused with the boot GPT partition)"。

MTK ROM 代码不开源,但 NCC Group 通过 side-channel timing + DAT0 抓波形推断出 BootROM 大约经历 100ms 左右的 eMMC 读阶段,然后 ~700ms 做解析 + 验签,之后剩下 1.2s 左右是 preloader 自己的初始化。

控制器寄存器层面(MTK SoC 通常用自研 IP 而非标准 SDHCI,但行为一致):
```
eMMC_CTRL_REG    = base + 0x00  // 控制: reset / clock enable / power
eMMC_CLK_CTRL    = base + 0x04  // 时钟分频
eMMC_INT_MASK    = base + 0x08  // 中断屏蔽
eMMC_BOOT_CTRL   = base + 0x10  // BOOT_EN=1 + BOOT_MODE=alt
eMMC_BLOCK_SIZE  = base + 0x14
eMMC_DMA_ADDR    = base + 0x20  // DMA 目标(SRAM)
eMMC_ARG_REG     = base + 0x28  // CMD0 的 argument
eMMC_CMD_REG     = base + 0x2C  // 触发 CMD0/CMD1
eMMC_RESP_REG    = base + 0x30
```

```
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                            ▲ │
                  DMA 写 SRAM│ │读 CMD 寄存器
                            │ ▼
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  BootROM(Mask ROM,只读不可改)                                  │
│  · 解析 preloader header(签名/大小/入口地址)                    │
│  · 验签: SHA-256 哈希 + RSA-PSS 验证                          │
│  · 查 eFuse 公钥,验签失败则 halt / 进下载模式                │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                            ▼ (PC 跳到 SRAM)
                    Preloader(可改)
                  初始化 DRAM → 加载 LK → ...
```

## 6. 硬性事实清单(诚实声明)

| 关键结论 | 来源 | 可信度 |
|---|---|---|
| BootROM 用 **eMMC 规范 7.2 节 Alternative Boot Mode** | NCC Group 论文原文 + JEDEC eMMC 5.1 规范 | 高(协议级,有第三方抓波形佐证) |
| 两条 CMD0 命令 arg `0xF0F0F0F0` 和 `0xFFFFFFFA` | NCC Group MT8163V 论文直接抓出来 | 高(现场测量) |
| 传输是 **1-bit DAT0** 自动流式输出,耗时 ~100ms | NCC Group 论文 | 高 |
| Preloader 存在 **BOOT0 硬件分区**,双备份 | NCC Group + DavidBuchanan314 兔 R1 笔记 + 多份 MTK 调试博客 | 高(三方一致) |
| BOOT0 不行就进 Download Mode,UART 字符串 `[DL] 00009C40 00000000 010701` | NCC Group 论文 | 高 |
| BootROM 验签用 RSA-PSS + SHA-256,用 eFuse 公钥 | NCC Group + MTK IoT Secure Boot 文档 | 高 |
| BootROM 实际代码量很小,不是完整 mmc 驱动 | DavidBuchanan314(他自己写 mmc 驱动才能 dump preloader,从反向证据) | 高(旁证) |
| ❌ MTK BootROM 内部寄存器偏移地址 | ❌ 无法实测 | 该 SoC 闭源 ROM,任何具体偏移我都明确标注为"推测而非实测" |
| ❌ BootROM 真实走 SDHCI 还是自研寄存器 | ❌ 不开源 | MTK eMMC 控制器不直接用标准 SDHCI,但布局类似 |
| AOSP master 源码交叉验证 | ❌ 不适用 | BootROM 在 AOSP 没有 mirror,这是 MTK 私有 Mask ROM |
